title: Hy-Pro Dual Action Portable Pump - Bike & Football Pump Also Suitable for Bicycle Tyres, Rugby, Basketball, Netball - Compact & Lightweight with Needle and Bike Adapter, for All Sports Balls
features: Fast & Efficient Inflation: The Hy-Pro Dual Action portable pump inflates on both push and pull strokes, cutting inflation time in half. Perfect for quick and effortless use as a football pump, bike pump, or hand pump

Versatile for All Balls & Bikes: Ideal for inflating sports balls, including basketball pump, rugby ball pump, and volleyballs. The included bike adapter makes it suitable as a bicycle pump, cycle pump, and bike tyre pump

Compact & Lightweight Design: This mini pump is easy to carry in a pocket, backpack, or bike holder, making it the ideal portable bike pump for cyclists and athletes who need a reliable on-the-go solution

Ergonomic & Easy to Use: Designed for comfort, the ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip for effortless inflation. Includes a ball pump with needle and football pump needle to work with different valve types
Complete Set with Needles & Bike Adapter: Includes a football pump needle and a bike adapter, making it perfect for inflating sports balls and tyres. A must-have football pump set for home or travel
description: The Hy-Pro Dual Action portable pump is designed for fast and effortless inflation, making it an essential accessory for athletes and cyclists. With its dual-action technology, this hand pump inflates on both push and pull strokes, reducing inflation time so you can get back to the game or road faster. Ideal for all types of balls, including footballs, basketballs, rugby balls, and netballs, this pump comes with ball pump needles UK for compatibility with different valve types. The included bike adapter ensures it works as a small bike pump, perfect for keeping tyres at the right pressure whether you're cycling in the city or on mountain trails. Lightweight and compact, this mini pump easily fits into backpacks, pockets, or bike holders, making it the perfect companion for on-the-go inflation. Whether you're looking for bike pumps for all bikes or a reliable exercise ball pump, this versatile tool is built for convenience and efficiency. Complete with a football pump needle and bike adapter, the Hy-Pro football pump set is a must-have for sports enthusiasts and cyclists alike. Stay prepared for every game or ride with this durable, high-performance bicycle pump
